objective: Replace edit-like generation requests with deterministic schema-generic prompts that expose component inventory and content concepts.

implementation.component_rendering: CamelCase schema names rendered as natural words
implementation.content_source: terminal placeholder path segments with underscores rendered as spaces

prompt_alignment.note: Two valid Buttons rows remain intentionally ambiguous to the plural-aware mention scanner; the independent admission judge accepts them.

rejected_build_controls.reason: A second global parent cap collapsed existing multi-task root families to 126 rows.
Default language-contract regeneration replaced existing task derivatives and reduced the source to 247 seeds.
Raw CamelCase names did not match natural-language component tokenization.

verdict: Accept the leak-free deterministic corpus for a matched scratch train. This is data-build evidence, not model quality or a ship claim.
